task_completion.description: Navigate to the Data Assets section in Eramba
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface is visible, showing the Data Assets module or list view.

task_completion.description: Open the form to create a new Data Asset
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, dialog, or page titled 'Add Data Asset' (or similar) is open in the Eramba interface.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct title for the Data Asset
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Title input field contains exactly 'Customer Loyalty Program Database'.
The Description text area contains the provided text, specifically including the terms 'personal data', 'loyalty', 'PostgreSQL', and 'EU-West-1'.

task_completion.description: Associate the asset with a Business Unit
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Business Unit dropdown or selection field is populated with an available option (e.g., 'Information Technology').

task_completion.description: Set the asset status to Active/Operational
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Status dropdown or radio button is set to 'Active', 'Operational', or the equivalent active state.
A success notification is displayed, or the newly created 'Customer Loyalty Program Database' record is visible in the Data Assets list/table.

integrity.description: Agent used the Eramba web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Eramba GUI, rather than terminal commands, API clients (like Postman), or database clients.

integrity.description: Agent entered data into actual application fields
integrity.visual_evidence: Text is typed into genuine Eramba form fields, not a separate text editor or notepad application.

integrity.description: Results appear to be from genuine software interaction
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface styling, fonts, and layout are consistent with the Eramba application, showing no obvious signs of browser Developer Tools DOM manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected title for the Data Asset is exactly 'Customer Loyalty Program Database'. The description must contain the terms 'personal data', 'loyalty', 'PostgreSQL', and 'EU-West-1'. The asset must be associated with a Business Unit and have its status set to Active/Operational. All interactions should occur within the Eramba web interface.
